public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as boundary witness.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a boundary witness still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of boundary witness in and around Merchant Trail Junction, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Merchant Trail Junction workable through the obligations of boundary witness while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Merchant Trail Junction, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of boundary witness visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Arin Hart needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Merchant Trail Junction.
Arin Hart can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Arin Hart communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Merchant Trail Junction: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
